span.p:
FIX 1: add resourcePackages block
name must match themeCollection.baseTheme.name

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FIX 2: bump version.json value to '2.0.0'
(leave $schema URL ending /1.0.0/)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Run executeQueries against the model
(see Diagnostic API calls). If model is healthy,
capture browser network trace and escalate.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FIX 4: strip ALL prototypeQuery blocks from visual.json files
Fabric rejects them (additionalProperties: false) as of ~June 2026.
Rebuild query state with nativeQueryRef + role-correct active flag.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FIX 5A: remove 'active' from measure projections
(active belongs ONLY on column projections in axis/slicer roles)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FIX 5B: add nativeQueryRef to every projection
(just the field/measure name, no table prefix)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FIX 5C: add 'active: true' to column projections
in Category / Series / slicer-Values roles

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Verify queryRef format is 'Table.Field'
and the field actually exists in the deployed model
